content.text:
Here are the verification results:

**1. Azaria & Mitchell (EMNLP 2023)** — OK. Title, authors, venue all correct.

**2. Burger, Hamprecht & Nadler (NeurIPS 2024)** — OK. Title, authors, venue all correct.

**3. Burns, Ye, Klein & Steinhardt (ICLR 2023)** — OK. Title, authors, venue all correct.

**4. Chlon, Karim, Chlon & Awada (arXiv:2509.11208, 2025)** — DISCREPANCY in title. The actual title is **"Predictable Compression Failures: Order Sensitivity and Information Budgeting for Evidence-Grounded Binary Adjudication"**, not "Order Sensitivity and Information Budgeting: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate". Authors and arXiv ID are correct. Year is listed as 2025 which matches the initial submission (Sep 2025), though there is a v2 from Feb 2026.

**5. Deletang, Ruoss, Grau-Moya et al. (ICLR 2024)** — OK. Title, venue, year correct. Note: the full author list includes many more authors (Duquenne, Catt, Genewein, Mattern, Wenliang, Aitchison, Orseau, Hutter, Veness), and Grau-Moya is not second/third author but listed later. The "et al." covers this, so acceptable. Also, the first name spelling is "Gregoire" in your reference but the actual paper uses "Grégoire" (with accent) — minor.

**6. Elazar, Kassner, Ravfogel et al. (arXiv:2207.14251, 2022)** — DISCREPANCY in authors. Your reference lists: Elazar, Kassner, Ravfogel, Ravichander, Hovy, Schutze, Goldberg. The actual author list is: Elazar, Kassner, Ravfogel, **Feder**, Ravichander, **Mosbach**, **Belinkov**, Schutze, Goldberg. You are **missing three authors** (Amir Feder, Marius Mosbach, Yonatan Belinkov) and **include Eduard Hovy who is NOT an author** of this paper.

**7. Penedo, Kydlicek, Lozhkov et al. (arXiv:2406.17557, 2024)** — DISCREPANCY in authors. The actual author list includes **Loubna Ben Allal, Colin Raffel, Leandro Von Werra** among others. Your reference lists Mitchell and Wolf (who are indeed authors) but omits Ben Allal, Raffel, and Von Werra. The listed authors (Penedo, Kydlicek, Lozhkov, Mitchell, Wolf) are all real authors, so with "et al." this is acceptable. OK.

**8. Goldblum, Finzi, Rowan & Wilson (ICML 2024)** — DISCREPANCY in title. The published title is **"Position: The No Free Lunch Theorem, Kolmogorov Complexity, and the Role of Inductive Biases in Machine Learning"** — it has the "Position:" prefix, indicating it was a position paper. Authors and venue are correct.

**9. Grunwald, MIT Press 2007** — OK. Title, author, publisher, year all correct.

**10. Gurnee & Tegmark (ICLR 2024)** — OK. Title, authors, venue all correct.

---

**Summary of issues to fix:**

- **Ref 4**: Title is wrong. Should be "Predictable Compression Failures: Order Sensitivity and Information Budgeting for Evidence-Grounded Binary Adjudication".
- **Ref 6**: Eduard Hovy is not an author of this paper. Missing authors: Amir Feder, Marius Mosbach, Yonatan Belinkov.
- **Ref 8**: Missing "Position:" prefix in the title (this is part of the official published title at ICML).
